Triumvirate.Composition: Elected leaders (Finance & Trade, Military & Defense, Civil matters)

Spiders.Strategic Contribution: Master strategists and architects of the Concord's economic and intelligence networks.

Primary Roles: Infantry, primary workforce for civil engineering and organizational projects
Ants.Strategic Contribution: The disciplined backbone of the military and labor force, enabling grand-scale logistical and engineering feats.

Primary Roles: Military leadership (generals, special operations, siege specialists)
Mantises & Scorpions.Strategic Contribution: The martial arm's elite command, specializing in high-impact combat, covert operations, and breaking enemy fortifications.

Beetles.Strategic Contribution: The logistical core of the Concord, ensuring the seamless movement of resources, troops, and information across the wasteland.

Chaos Corps.Strategic Contribution: Fighting chaos with chaos, altering the battlefield to misdirect and disrupt enemy chaotic effects.

Key Arrangements.[[Sump-Kin]]: Bio-industrialists hauling away industrial toxic waste
Key Arrangements.[[Crimson Corsairs]]: Privateers disrupting grain shipments of rival factions

[[Shadow Week]].Response: Supreme organization, mandatory downtime for inventory and audit
